_meta.description: Terrain features for Canon Engine RPG combat encounters
_meta.note: Features modify combat when present in an encounter area

terrain_features.name: Low Wall
terrain_features.description: A waist-high stone wall providing partial protection.

interactions.description: Leap over the wall as difficult terrain

terrain_features.name: Stone Pillar
terrain_features.description: A thick stone pillar that blocks line of sight completely.

interactions.description: Hide behind pillar, DC varies by enemy awareness

terrain_features.name: Elevated Platform
terrain_features.description: A raised surface providing a tactical advantage to those who climb it.

combat_bonus.description: +2 to attack rolls from elevated position

terrain_features.name: Oil Barrel
terrain_features.description: A leaking barrel of oil. Highly flammable.

combat_bonus.description: Explodes when hit by fire damage

interactions.description: Ignite spilled oil for 2d6 fire damage in area

terrain_features.name: Chandelier
terrain_features.description: A heavy iron chandelier hanging from a chain above.

combat_bonus.description: Can be dropped on enemies below

interactions.description: Cut the chain to drop the chandelier
Swing across the room on the chandelier

terrain_features.name: Thorny Bushes
terrain_features.description: Dense bushes covered in sharp thorns.

combat_bonus.description: Costs extra movement and deals damage when entering

terrain_features.name: Murky Water
terrain_features.description: Shallow, murky water that slows movement and obscures submerged objects.

combat_bonus.description: Difficult terrain, +2 to stealth while submerged

interactions.description: Hold breath and submerge for stealth

terrain_features.name: Magical Darkness
terrain_features.description: An area of impenetrable magical darkness. Normal light cannot illuminate it.

combat_bonus.description: Attacks into/out of darkness have heavy disadvantage

terrain_features.name: Crumbling Floor
terrain_features.description: Weakened floor that may collapse under weight or impact.

combat_bonus.description: Floor collapses, dropping characters to level below
